projectDescription: Mintlify is a documentation platform that lets teams publish beautiful, AI-powered documentation sites from MDX files with zero infrastructure management.
keyFeatures: MDX-based documentation authoring with rich component library
Automatic deployment via GitHub integration — push to publish
Local preview with Mintlify CLI (`mint dev`)
AI-assisted writing with Cursor, Claude Code, and Windsurf integrations
Customizable branding: colors, logos, navigation structure
publicApiSurface: mint dev — start local preview server
mint dev --port <number> — use a custom port
mint update — update the CLI to the latest version
docs.json — site configuration file (name, colors, navigation, logo, favicon, openapi)
navigation.tabs / navigation.groups / navigation.pages — navigation structure schema
openapi field — link to OpenAPI spec for auto-generated API docs
npx skills add <url> — install AI writing skill for your editor
